name: Liu Chong Hing Investment Limited
summary: Liu Chong Hing Investment Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the investment, development, management, and letting of real estate properties in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Property Investment, Property Development, Property Management, Treasury Investment, Trading and Manufacturing, and Hotel Operation segments. Its projects primarily include offices, commercial buildings, residential buildings, industrial buildings, and shopping centers, as well as retail stores. The company also provides money lending and nominee services; operates and manages budget hotels under the Hanting name, as well as 183-room hotel and serviced residences; manufactures magnetic materials; and deals and invests in securities and other financial instruments, as well as develops and sells properties, including interior decoration services. In addition, it is involved in the food and beverage business. The company was incorporated in 1970 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
